meta.title: Cloud Security Assessment Services | GuidePoint Security
meta.description: Your cloud environment may be vulnerable to attack. Our cloud security assessment services evaluate your security posture and provide reliable solutions.

paragraphs: The cloud provides many business and operational advantages, but you must understand your cloud readiness and maturity in order to ensure a “security first” approach.

Our portfolio of cloud security assessment services ensure you understand the current state of your environment and help guide you on your cloud security journey. These cloud security assessment services include:

headings.text: Gain a Quantified Snapshot of Your Current Cloud Estate

paragraphs: For organizations that already have a cloud footprint, our Cloud Maturity Assessment provides your organization with a clear understanding of how far along you are in your journey toward the cloud. Our maturity assessment is essential when you need to begin planning your progress and maturing your capabilities in the cloud – these assessments are ideal for organizations that are both relatively new to the cloud as well as those that have already matured their activities in the cloud.

sections.domClasses: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-b141b45 services-lifecycle services-review-process elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-height-default watching-viewport in-view
paragraphs: Our health check service provides a look at your cloud environment from a people, process and technology perspective. We provide a comprehensive report and roadmap to remediating any issues discovered with a comprehensive cloud vulnerability assessment.

items: Technology: We examine your cloud environment against our cloud security framework, which combines industry standards like NIST, CCM and CSP controls along with our own controls.
People: We interview individuals who manage your cloud security assessments program to understand the strengths and weaknesses of your program.
Process: We review processes utilized by your team to secure the cloud environment.

headings.text: Identify Gaps in Your Cloud Infrastructure

paragraphs: Our Cloud Infrastructure Security Assessment provides your organization with a clear understanding of your cloud security posture. This assessment helps you to:
Make it easy to understand the biggest challenges to overcome BEFORE your cloud migration.
Ensure compliance with relevant industry regulations as you begin working in a cloud environment.
Leverage reliable, custom-fit solutions to remediate vulnerabilities in your cloud environment.

sections.domClasses: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-ec5873f services-lifecycle elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default watching-viewport
paragraphs: It is essential that your organization ensures industry compliance if it’s handling sensitive data — this is particularly relevant to organizations that are routinely handling healthcare and financial-related information. By conducting a cloud security audit, we can help you identify any existing gaps in your security compliance and provide recommendations to remediate those gaps.

We only conduct our security audits after gaining a clear understanding of the cloud security policies that have been put in place by your cloud service provider and we will help you prepare for any upcoming security compliances that your organization intends to acquire down the road.

headings.text: Know Where You Are in Your Cloud Journey

paragraphs: Our Cloud Security Assessments are designed to help you understand your organization’s cloud readiness and/or the maturity level of your organizational cloud posture.
Better understand the obstacles to ensuring a secure migration to the cloud.
Gain a quantifiable assessment of your existing cloud estate with clear steps to improve and optimize.
Analyze your people, process and technology to identify and remediate cloud-related risks.
